title: Have news for us?  We are on duty
bodyText:
[{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS -  Mossel Bay Advertiser will continue to share daily news with its readers on its online platform during the holiday season.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Mossel Bay Advertiser will continue to share daily news with its readers on its online platform during the holiday season."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The offices are closed from 19 December until 5 January, but we will continue to keep our readers updated on our digital platforms."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Want to know the latest on what is happening in Mossel Bay and surrounds? Visit www.mosselbayadvertiser.com or like the paper's Facebook page.","html":"Want to know the latest on what is happening in Mossel Bay and surrounds? Visit www.mosselbayadvertiser.com or like the paper's Facebook page."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"We also have news on Instagram, TikTok and X.","html":"We also have news on Instagram, TikTok and X."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"If you have a story you would like to share with us during the holidays, contact the following:• 19 tot 27 December: Gabriélla Siebritz on 072 853 3908• 28 December to 4 January: Chelsea Pieterse on 083 777 3578.","html":"If you have a story you would like to share with us during the holidays, contact the following:
• 19 tot 27 December: Gabriélla Siebritz on 072 853 3908
• 28 December to 4 January: Chelsea Pieterse on 083 777 3578."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Gabriélla Siebritz","html":"Gabriélla Siebritz"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
